text: A deed that conveys any interest in real property to the state for a highway purpose shall be deposited and retained in the Austin office of the department.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.502 — Retention of Deed

A deed that conveys any interest in real property to the state for a highway purpose shall be deposited and retained in the Austin office of the department.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
